summary: Completed testing of Notification Engine and Logout Button for NASSAQ School Management System - Iteration 13. Backend: 10/11 tests passed (1 skipped). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Notifications are working correctly with real data from MongoDB. Logout button works correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Bell icon in header is static (not using NotificationBell component) - doesn't show unread count or dropdown
ui_bugs.selector: Button with Bell icon in SchoolDashboard.jsx line 130-132

passed_tests: Backend: PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read - Marks all as read
Frontend: Sidebar with logout button visible
Frontend: Logout button clears session and redirects to /login
Frontend: Protected route /notifications redirects to /login when not authenticated
Frontend: Notifications page loads with data-testid='notifications-page'
Frontend: Notification cards display with attendance type badge
Frontend: 'Mark All as Read' button visible when unread notifications exist
Frontend: Filter dropdowns present on notifications page
Frontend: Attendance notification created when teacher records absent student
action_items: Replace static Bell icon in SchoolDashboard.jsx (line 130-132) with NotificationBell component to show unread count and dropdown
critical_code_review_comments: NotificationBell component exists and works correctly in Header.jsx
SchoolDashboard.jsx uses static Bell icon instead of NotificationBell component - should be updated
Notification APIs properly handle CRUD operations
Attendance engine correctly triggers notifications for absent/late students
Logout functionality properly clears localStorage and redirects to login
Protected routes correctly redirect unauthenticated users to login

success_rate.backend: 91% - 10 passed, 1 skipped (attendance trigger test skipped due to no students in class)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification Engine is fully functional. All APIs working: GET /api/notifications (with filters), GET /api/notifications/unread-count, PUT /api/notifications/{id}/read, PUT /api/notifications/mark-all-read, DELETE /api/notifications/{id}, GET /api/notifications/analytics. Attendance engine triggers notifications when absent/late attendance is recorded. Logout button in sidebar works correctly. One minor issue: SchoolDashboard uses static Bell icon instead of NotificationBell component.

attendance_notification_trigger.description: Recording absent attendance creates notification for principal

logout_button.status: ✓ Working - clears session and redirects to /login

protected_routes.status: ✓ Working - /notifications redirects to /login when not authenticated

notification_bell.issue: Not used in SchoolDashboard.jsx - static Bell icon instead
